atomicity.message: Staged payload is the OXP config schema unit only: it changes config model/validation/source reporting plus CLI robot/help documentation and tests for defaults.init.orchestrator and defaults.repair.orchestrator.

conditions.message: The staged Go/config payload is formatted, diff-check clean, and keeps config validation explicit for the new orchestrator defaults.
evidence: Ran `git diff --cached --check`; it exited clean with no whitespace/error output.

Ran `gofmt -l cmd/burpvalve/config_test.go cmd/burpvalve/help_test.go cmd/burpvalve/main.go internal/config/config.go internal/config/config_test.go` in an isolated detached worktree with only the staged slice applied; it printed no files.

Inspected staged `internal/config/config.go`; `defaults.init.orchestrator` is validated as `off|orchestrator-md|claude-md`, then `claude-md` is explicitly rejected as unsupported until deferred option A ships; `defaults.repair.orchestrator` is a bool pointer.
Ran focused config/cmd tests and full `go test ./...` in the isolated staged-slice worktree; all passed.

conditions.message: Governed surface inspected. The new enum/bool support reuses the existing scaffold-default merge/source/reporting machinery and does not introduce meaningful duplicated logic.
evidence: git diff --cached -- internal/config/config.go showed InitDefaults and RepairDefaults embed the existing ScaffoldDefaults rather than copying every scaffold bool field.

The same diff showed mergeInitDefaults/mergeRepairDefaults delegate to mergeScaffoldDefaults, and noteInitSources/noteRepairSources delegate to noteScaffoldSources before adding only the orchestrator-specific key.
git diff --cached -- cmd/burpvalve/main.go showed existing configuredInitDefaults/configuredRepairDefaults paths now pass .ScaffoldDefaults, avoiding a parallel scaffold-defaults implementation.

conditions.message: Governed surface inspected. The payload makes the new orchestrator config state explicit and rejects unsupported or invalid values instead of accepting reward-friendly silent defaults.
evidence: git diff --cached -- internal/config/config.go showed defaults.init.orchestrator validation rejects values outside off/orchestrator-md/claude-md and then separately rejects claude-md with the deferred-option-A error.

git show :internal/config/config_test.go | sed -n '130,360p' showed TestLoadRejectsBadOrchestratorDefaults covers bad enum, deferred claude-md, and wrong repair type, so unsupported values cannot silently fall back.

Clean staged snapshot probe: printf robot config init JSON with defaults.init.orchestrator=claude-md | go run ./cmd/burpvalve --robots config init --json returned rc=1 and output 'defaults.init.orchestrator=claude-md is not yet supported; deferred option A must ship first'.

conditions.message: The new schema, merge/source tracking, rejection cases, config output, and robot-help behavior have direct test coverage.
evidence: Inspected staged `internal/config/config_test.go`; it adds `TestLoadOrchestratorDefaultsMergeProjectOverrideAndSourceTracking` and `TestLoadRejectsBadOrchestratorDefaults` for merge/source behavior, bad enum rejection, deferred `claude-md` rejection, and repair wrong-type rejection.
Inspected staged `cmd/burpvalve/config_test.go`; it extends JSON config output/source tests and robot config help tests for init/repair orchestrator defaults.
Inspected staged `cmd/burpvalve/help_test.go`; it adds robot-help expectations for init/repair orchestrator schema and the `claude-md` deferred rejection note.

Ran `go test ./internal/config -run 'Orchestrator|ScaffoldDefaults|Validate|Merge|Sources' -count=1` and `go test ./cmd/burpvalve -run 'TestConfig|TestRobotsConfig|TestSetupConfig|TestCompletionVerifyUsesConfiguredDefaults|TestCompletionVerifyFlagsOverrideConfiguredDefaults' -count=1`; both passed in the isolated staged-slice worktree.

conditions.message: Governed surface inspected. The staged payload satisfies the bead acceptance criteria and the claimed verification commands reproduced on a staged-only snapshot.
evidence: br show project-readiness-kit-oxp-config-orchestrator-enum-kpl --json described the exact schema contract: init string enum off/orchestrator-md/claude-md with claude-md rejected, repair bool, merge/source/config output/docs/tests.

Clean staged snapshot reproduced the packet hash: go run ./cmd/burpvalve verifier prompts --feature project-readiness-kit-oxp-config-orchestrator-enum-kpl --profile ntm --json | jq -r .staged_payload_hash => sha256:b1749be84827251a76ae949a7d3cb14df27b2a743834fa4b4ac2a6f414f9c921.

Clean staged snapshot tests passed: go test ./internal/config -run 'Orchestrator|ScaffoldDefaults|Validate|Merge|Sources' -count=1; go test ./cmd/burpvalve -run 'TestConfig|TestRobotsConfig|TestSetupConfig|TestCompletionVerifyUsesConfiguredDefaults|TestCompletionVerifyFlagsOverrideConfiguredDefaults' -count=1; go test ./...; git diff --cached --check produced no output.

conditions.message: Verifier evidence is recorded with hash binding, staged-path confirmation, packet regeneration, code inspection, and isolated test results.
evidence: Read Agent Mail message 2789; it specifies staged payload hash `sha256:b1749be84827251a76ae949a7d3cb14df27b2a743834fa4b4ac2a6f414f9c921`, manifest hash `sha256:00e2a9854cb8dcbdde3e942841f405f13b196fd8b3ebe884380dd9f8c0fc8df5`, and five staged paths.

Ran `go run ./cmd/burpvalve verifier prompts --feature project-readiness-kit-oxp-config-orchestrator-enum-kpl --profile ntm --json`; it recomputed the same staged payload hash and manifest hash and listed exactly the five staged files with no hash-excluded payload.

Compared `/tmp/oxp-config-verifier-prompts.json` with regenerated `/tmp/oxp-config-verifier-prompts-scarlet-regenerated.json`; both report the same feature id, staged payload hash, manifest hash, and 13 condition ids.
Ran `git diff --cached --name-status` and `git diff --cached --stat`; staged payload is exactly the five named config/help files with 184 insertions and 26 deletions.
Ran full `go test ./...` in an isolated detached worktree with only this staged slice applied; all packages passed.

conditions.message: Governed surface inspected. The staged work stays within oxp-config schema scope and defers installation/wiring behavior to later beads.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status listed only cmd/burpvalve/config_test.go, cmd/burpvalve/help_test.go, cmd/burpvalve/main.go, internal/config/config.go, and internal/config/config_test.go.

git diff --cached --stat showed 184 insertions/26 deletions across config model, CLI/help docs, and tests only; no scaffold install, ORCHESTRATOR.md write, dependency, manifest, or unrelated file changes were staged.
git diff --cached -- cmd/burpvalve/main.go showed init/repair execution still consumes ScaffoldDefaults only; this payload adds config schema/reporting/docs, not option-B install behavior.

conditions.message: Governed surface inspected. The new schema support does not add destructive operations or weaken the existing confirmation gate for config writes.
evidence: git diff --cached -- internal/config/config.go cmd/burpvalve/main.go | rg -n 'exec\.Command|os\.Remove|reset|checkout|force|confirm' showed no new command execution, delete, reset, checkout, deploy, or external-send path.

git show :cmd/burpvalve/main.go | sed -n '5190,5255p' showed config init remains mutating only when --force or robot confirm=true is supplied, and writes only through existing bvconfig.Write to the selected config path.
The staged robot/help text explicitly preserves 'mutating commands require --force or stdin JSON with confirm=true'.

conditions.message: Governed surface inspected. The persisted config schema has explicit merge/source/validation coverage and preserves existing scaffold defaults without lossy conversion.
evidence: git show :internal/config/config.go | rg -n 'DisallowUnknownFields|Validate|Orchestrator|mergeInitDefaults|mergeRepairDefaults|noteInitSources|noteRepairSources' -C 4 showed strict decoding remains enabled, merge preserves scaffold fields, and source tracking records both new keys.

TestLoadOrchestratorDefaultsMergeProjectOverrideAndSourceTracking asserts project overrides global for both defaults.init.orchestrator and defaults.repair.orchestrator and records project sources for both.
TestLoadRejectsBadOrchestratorDefaults asserts invalid enum values, unsupported claude-md, and wrong repair type all fail instead of persisting corrupt config state.

conditions.message: Governed surface inspected. Strict schema boundaries remain in place and the payload does not add new security-sensitive I/O beyond local config parsing/reporting.
evidence: git show :internal/config/config.go | rg -n 'DisallowUnknownFields' -C 4 showed config file parsing still uses json.Decoder.DisallowUnknownFields, and git show :cmd/burpvalve/main.go | sed -n '5248,5278p' showed config-init file/stdin parsing uses decodeStrictJSON with DisallowUnknownFields.

git diff --cached -- internal/config/config.go cmd/burpvalve/main.go showed no credential, token, network, permission, or external API surface added; staged changes are local config schema/help/reporting only.
The clean staged snapshot full suite passed: go test ./... => ok for cmd/burpvalve and all internal packages.

conditions.message: No governed visual-regression surface is present in this staged payload.
evidence: Read `backpressure/visual-regression.md`; it governs screenshot, browser, responsive layout, canvas, and visual-diff checks for UI work.

Inspected staged paths and diff; the payload changes config schema/types, config command output docs, robot help strings, and Go tests only, with no browser UI, canvas, CSS, responsive layout, image, or visual-diff surface.
The changed CLI/help/config behavior is covered by Go tests rather than visual regression tooling.

conditions.message: Governed surface inspected. The change adds constant-time config field handling and documentation/tests, with no new performance-sensitive runtime path.
evidence: git diff --cached --stat showed a small schema/test/help payload only: 184 insertions and 26 deletions across five files.

git diff --cached -- internal/config/config.go cmd/burpvalve/main.go | rg -n 'goroutine|cache|performance|exec\.Command' found no new concurrency, caching, external process, or hot-path expensive work.

Clean staged snapshot go test ./... completed successfully; package timings included cmd/burpvalve 38.917s, internal/backpressure 4.476s, internal/config 0.040s, and other packages at small/no-test durations.

conditions.message: Governed surface inspected. The payload does not let agents silently opt into unsupported orchestrator behavior or bypass the existing config-write confirmation boundary.
evidence: git show :cmd/burpvalve/main.go | sed -n '5190,5255p' showed writeConfigInit still requires opts.force and otherwise returns 'config init is mutating; pass --force or use --robots with confirm=true'.
git diff --cached -- cmd/burpvalve/main.go showed robot notes continue to state '--robots never opens Bubble Tea prompts' and 'mutating commands require --force or stdin JSON with confirm=true'.
The clean staged robot config-init probe for unsupported claude-md failed before writing supported option-A behavior, preserving the deferred human/product boundary.
